content: Official deploy path is the withastro/action GitHub Action (github.com/withastro/action), invoked from .github/workflows/deploy.yml with permissions contents:read, pages:write, id-token:write. Inputs: path (project root), node-version (defaults 24), package-manager (auto-detected from lockfile), out-dir (defaults dist). Repo Settings > Pages > Source must be set to 'GitHub Actions'. Commit the lockfile so the action can detect npm/pnpm/yarn/bun.
